ogTitle: Macksville vs Macmasters Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macksville and Macmasters Beach.
heading: Macksville vs Macmasters Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macksville, New South Wales and Macmasters Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macmasters Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Macksville (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macksville or Macmasters Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macksville has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Macmasters Beach scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macksville scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Macmasters Beach scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macksville or Macmasters Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macmasters Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
